description_long: This object consists of two modern smartphones, each with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The devices feature large, black glass screens on the front, with one phone having a dark metallic frame and the other a lighter, silver-toned frame. On the back, both phones have prominent camera modules in the upper left corner: one with a triple-lens array and the other with a single-lens setup, both housed in slightly raised, square camera bumps. The sides of the phones display several small, metallic buttons, likely for volume and power control. The overall design is minimalist and premium, with smooth surfaces and a glossy finish. These phones are typical of high-end models seen in urban environments, suitable for communication, photography, and digital interaction.
description: A pair of sleek, modern smartphones with large black screens, metallic frames, and prominent rear camera modules. The design is minimalist, glossy, and premium.
description_view_0: Rear view showing both phones' camera modules: one with a triple-lens array and the other with a single-lens, both in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slimness of the phones and the protrusion of the camera bumps, as well as the placement of side buttons.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large, uninterrupted black glass screens of both phones, with no visible buttons or logos.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the thinness and the camera bump protrusion, with no visible buttons on this edge.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screens are blank and turned off, showing no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: One phone has a triple camera array in a square bump at the top left corner on the back; the other has a single camera in a similar position and bump.
attribute_button_layout: Multiple small, metallic buttons are visible on the left edge of both phones, likely for volume and power control.
